title: anisomeles lappa
intro: Anisomeles lappa, also known as sweet root or Himalayan root, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce fever. The health benefits of Anisomeles lappa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Anisomeles lappa is often prepared as a decoction, powder, or oil, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
